member.name: T:Transfer
member.summary:
A transfer of Hbar that occurred within a transaction.

Returned with a {@link TransactionRecord}.

member.name: M:Transfer.FromProtobuf(Proto.AccountAmount)
member.summary: Create a transfer from a protobuf.

member.name: P:Transfer.Amount
member.summary: The amount that the account sends (negative) or receives (positive).

member.name: P:Transfer.AccountId
member.summary: The Account ID that sends or receives crypto-currency.
